title: Podcast Resources on Immanuel Kant's Prolegomena To Any Future Metaphysics
text:
# Gregory B. Sadler - That Philosophy Guy

Subscribe Sign in

[Resources](https://gregorybsadler.substack.com/s/sadlers-resources/?utm_source=substack&utm_medium=menu)

# Podcast Resources on Immanuel Kant's Prolegomena To Any Future Metaphysics

### 41 podcast lectures covering every key idea, argument, and distinction in the work

[](https://substack.com/@gregorybsadler)

[Gregory B. Sadler](https://substack.com/@gregorybsadler)

Oct 19, 2024

9

3 3

Share

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!W9nS!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F76929aab-5cc5-4f2d-ba99-7be73476c157_1280x1426.jpeg)

Some time back, I produced [a resource page containing organized links to all 41 of my core concept videos on Immanuel Kant’s work Prolegomena To Any Future Metaphysics](https://gregorybsadler.substack.com/p/video-resources-on-immanuel-kants) . A little while ago, I took those video lectures and edited each of them into a corresponding Sadler’s Lectures podcast episode. Usually, I would produce a resource page that contains links to both the video and podcast lectures. But given how many videos and podcasts there are on this work, I thought perhaps they could use separate resource pages.

So that’s what I’m providing here, the second resource page, with links just to all the podcast episodes. They cover every part and each key idea in the work, and might be a useful resource for anyone who decides they’d like to study that text.  
  
If you’d like to get yourself a copy of the text I used for this series, here’s [an Amazon affiliate link to the Prolegomena](https://amzn.to/3RxRlGz) . And now, on to the links to podcast lectures, sorted according to each of the sections of the work.

#### **Preface**

* [Problems With Metaphysics As A Science](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-problems-with-metaphysics-as-a-science?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [David Hume's Spur To Kant's Thinking](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-david-humes-spur-to-kants-thinking?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [The Prolegomena And The First Critique](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-the-prolegomena-and-the-first-critique?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)

#### **Preamble on the peculiarities of all metaphysical knowledge**

* [Differentiating Metaphysics As A Science](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-differentiating-metaphysics-as-a-science?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Analytic and Synthetic Judgements](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-analytic-and-synthetic-judgements?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Mathematical Judgements As Synthetic](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-mathematical-judgements-as-synthetic?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Metaphysical Judgements As Synthetic](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-metaphysical-judgements-as-synthetic?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [How Synthetic A Priori Cognitions Are Possible](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-how-are-synthetic-a-priori-cognitions-possible?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Dogmatism, Skepticism, and Metaphysics](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-dogmatism-skepticism-metaphysics?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)

#### **Part one of the main transcendental problem. How is pure mathematics possible?**

* [A Priori Intuitions](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-a-priori-intuitions?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Intuitions, Space, and Time](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-intuition-space-and-time?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Sensibility, Representation, and Geometry](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-sensibility-representations-and-geometry?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [How Illusions Arise](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-how-illusions-arise?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Avoiding Non Critical Idealism](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-avoiding-non-critical-idealism?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)

#### **Part two of the main transcendental problem. How is pure natural science possible?**

* [Nature and Pure Natural Science](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-nature-and-pure-natural-science?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Judgements of Perception and Experience](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-judgements-of-perception-and-experience?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Pure Concepts Of The Understanding](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-pure-concepts-of-the-understanding?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Principles of Possible Experience](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-principles-of-possible-experience?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Removing Hume's Doubt About Causality](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-removing-humes-doubt-about-causality?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Phenomena and Noumena](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-phenomena-and-noumena?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Pure and Empirical Laws of Nature](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-pure-and-empirical-laws-of-nature?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [The System of the Categories](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-the-system-of-the-categories?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)

#### **Part three of the main transcendental problem. How is metaphysics in general possible?**

* [The Peculiarity of Metaphysics](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-the-peculiarity-of-metaphysics?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Syllogisms and Pure Ideas of Reason](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-syllogisms-and-pure-ideas-of-reason?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Experience and Ideas of Reason](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-experience-and-pure-ideas-of-reason?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [The Psychological Ideas](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-the-psychological-ideas?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Cosmological Ideas and Antinomies](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-cosmological-ideas-and-antinomies?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [The Mathematical Antinomies](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-the-mathematical-antinomies?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [The Dynamical Antinomies](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-the-dynamic-antinomies?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [The Theological Idea](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-the-theological-idea-or-the-ideal-of-reason?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Transcendental Ideas and Systematic Unity](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-transcendental-ideas-and-systematic-unity?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)

#### **Conclusion. On the determination of the bounds of pure reason**

* [Skepticism, Dogmatism, and Critique](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-dogmatism-skepticism-and-critique?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Bounds and Limits of Reason](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-bounds-and-limits-of-reason?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Completion, Satisfaction, and Noumena](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-completion-satisfaction-and-noumena?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Deism, Theism, and Anthropomorphism](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-deism-theism-and-anthropomorphism?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [How Does Reason Set Boundaries?](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-how-does-reason-set-boundaries?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Natural Ends of Reason's Transcendent Concepts](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-natural-ends-of-reasons-transcendent-concepts?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)

#### **Solution of the general question of the Prolegomena. How is metaphysics possible as a science?**

* [Critique and Metaphysics As Science](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-critique-and-metaphysics-as-science?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Probability, Common Sense, and Metaphysics](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-probability-common-sense-and-metaphysics?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)

#### **Appendix**

* [Clarifications About Idealism](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-clarifications-about-idealism?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)
* [Metaphysics and the Other Sciences](https://soundcloud.com/gregorybsadler/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-metaphysics-and-the-other-sciences?in=gregorybsadler/sets/immanuel-kant-prolegomena-to)

So, there you have it - the entire series, all linked to in one place. If you decide you’d like to read Kant’s Prolegomena, perhaps these podcast lectures might be of some help and use to you!
